title: Tariff profiles
description: Routes with a price matrix between stops.
name: Name
invalidDateRange: End date cannot be before start date
editorDescription: Order stops and fill the price matrix.
needTwoStops: Add at least two stops for the matrix.
routePoliciesHint: Ordered refund and sale policies for the route (priority top to bottom).
routePoliciesNoRoute: Set route in profile settings to bind policies.
routePoliciesDuplicateRefund: A route may have at most one refund policy.
